author: doll-agent
content: Add tests/empty_arrays.rs covering 11 zero-length StringArray paths: 1D and 2D construction (shape [0], [0,3], [3,0]), case ops (upper/lower/capitalize/title), search ops (find/count/startswith/endswith/rfind/replace), classify (isalpha/isdigit/isspace), concat (add), multiply, and search::count namespace path. The existing 'empty_array' test was actually constructing a length-4 array of empty strings - not a true zero-element shape.
